channel.title: TOEFL Daily Immersion
channel.description: All-day TOEFL-style sentences and vocabulary for passive listening and shadowing.
channel.itunes:author: TOEFL Trainer
channel.itunes:summary: All-day TOEFL-style sentences and vocabulary for passive listening and shadowing.

item.title: Ep 2 · 60 sentences + 34 words
item.description: 60 TOEFL sentences and 34 vocabulary items for shadowing.
item.itunes:summary: 60 TOEFL sentences and 34 vocabulary items for shadowing.

item.title: Ep 1 · 12 sentences + 7 words
item.description: 12 TOEFL sentences and 7 vocabulary items for shadowing.
